ddls:
CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword being tracked */,
  "intent" TEXT /* Search intent of the keyword (e.g., N for Navigation, I for Information, C for Commercial, NT for Not Transparent) */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position of the keyword in search engine rankings */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Search volume of the keyword */,
  "cpc" REAL /* Cost-per-click for the keyword in USD */,
  "traffic_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of traffic the keyword generates */,
  "keyword_group" TEXT /* Categorize keywords into groups (e.g., Product, Service, Brand) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Track the last update time for the keyword data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Indicate the status of the keyword (e.g., Active, Inactive, Pending) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Link the keyword to a specific client */,
  "source" TEXT /* Indicate the source of the keyword data (e.g., Google, Bing, Manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_intent FOREIGN KEY ("intent") REFERENCES intents ("intent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intents" (
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search intent */,
  "intent_name" TEXT /* Name of the search intent (e.g., N, I, C, NT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the search intent */,
  "example_queries" TEXT /* Provide example search queries associated with the intent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Track the last update time for the intent data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position record */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position of the keyword in search engine rankings */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the position was recorded */,
  "search_engine" TEXT /* Specify the search engine (e.g., Google, Bing, Yahoo) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Indicate the device type (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Search volume of the keyword */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the volume was recorded */,
  "search_engine" TEXT /* Specify the search engine (e.g., Google, Bing, Yahoo) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Indicate the region for the search volume (e.g., US, EU, Asia) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volumes_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpcs" (
  "cpc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPC record */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  "cpc" REAL /* Cost-per-click for the keyword in USD */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the CPC was recorded */,
  "search_engine" TEXT /* Specify the search engine (e.g., Google, Bing, Yahoo) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Indicate the region for the CPC data (e.g., US, EU, Asia) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cpc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpcs_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_percentages" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic percentage record */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  "traffic_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of traffic the keyword generates */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the traffic percentage was recorded */,
  "search_engine" TEXT /* Specify the search engine (e.g., Google, Bing, Yahoo) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Indicate the device type (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_percentages_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, marketing specialist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Store the hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Track the last login time */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Link the user to a specific client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the keyword data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the keyword data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* Log the IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Log the user agent string for additional security and analytics */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Provide details of the action performed (e.g., specific keyword queried, changes made) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
